# services.opensearch

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.opensearch`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.opensearch.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Data directory for OpenSearch. If you change this, you need to manually create the directory. You also need to create the `opensearch` user and group, or change [](#opt-services.opensearch.user) and [](#opt-services.opensearch.group) to existing ones with access to the directory. |
| `services.opensearch.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable OpenSearch. |
| `services.opensearch.extraCmdLineOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options for the OpenSearch launcher. |
| `services.opensearch.extraJavaOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options for Java. |
| `services.opensearch.group` | `string` | The group OpenSearch runs as. Should be left at default unless you have very specific needs. |
| `services.opensearch.logging` | `string` | opensearch logging configuration. |
| `services.opensearch.package` | `package` | The OpenSearch package to use. |
| `services.opensearch.restartIfChanged` | `boolean` | Automatically restart the service on config change. This can be set to false to defer restarts on a server or cluster. Please consider the security implications of inadvertently running an older version, and the possibility of unexpected behavior caused by inconsistent versions across a cluster when disabling this option. |
| `services.opensearch.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | OpenSearch configuration. |
| `services.opensearch.settings."cluster.name"` | `string` | The name of the cluster. |
| `services.opensearch.settings."discovery.type"` | `string` | The type of discovery to use. |
| `services.opensearch.settings."http.port"` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on for HTTP traffic. |
| `services.opensearch.settings."network.host"` | `string` | Which port this service should listen on. |
| `services.opensearch.settings."plugins.security.disabled"` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the security plugin, `plugins.security.ssl.transport.keystore_filepath` or `plugins.security.ssl.transport.server.pemcert_filepath` and `plugins.security.ssl.transport.client.pemcert_filepath` must be set for this plugin to be enabled. |
| `services.opensearch.settings."transport.port"` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on for transport traffic. |
| `services.opensearch.user` | `string` | The user OpenSearch runs as. Should be left at default unless you have very specific needs. |
